tuning_key.text: We wonder how to be free to some degree / Every day can be new if you choose
tuning_key.attribution: Chords of Truth — Lucid Principles Canon (CC BY 4.0)

context_block: There is more room to breathe than yesterday's script allowed, and the brightness waiting there is generous beyond what you rehearsed. Let the light find a new angle through you—strange, alive, and already free. You do not have to earn the newness; you only have to choose it, and the day will meet you there.

practice.title: Release the Rehearsal
practice.instruction: Let your shoulders drop and your jaw soften, allowing the body to recognize it is no longer required to hold yesterday's tension.

practice.title: Open to Brightness
practice.instruction: Feel the air enter as a generous brightness, occupying the space you had forgotten was yours to claim.

practice.title: Receive the Echo
practice.instruction: Listen to the echo now and let the surprise of joy rearrange something in your chest, choosing this moment as genuinely new.
